Industrial Engineering

AlrantisaAmiena Raisa

Supply Chain & Industrial Engineering Professional

Final-year Industrial Engineering student at Sebelas Maret University with practical experience in Supply Chain Operations, Inventory Control, Production Planning, Procurement, and ERP-based business processes. Throughout academic projects, industrial internships, and organizational experiences, I have developed expertise in process improvement, operational performance analysis, dashboard development, and inventory management. Driven by a passion for Supply Chain Management, Data Analytics, and Work System Design, I enjoy solving complex operational challenges through analytical thinking, continuous improvement, and cross-functional collaboration. My goal is to create efficient, data-driven solutions that enhance business performance and deliver sustainable operational excellence.

Who I Am

About Me

I am a final-year Industrial Engineering student at Sebelas Maret University with a strong interest in Supply Chain Management, Operations Excellence, Work System Design, and Ergonomics. Through professional internships and academic projects, I have gained hands-on experience in Inventory Control, Production Planning, Procurement, ERP-based operations, and business process improvement.

My experience at PAKO Group and PT PP (Persero) Tbk has strengthened my ability to analyze operational challenges, manage inventory-related processes, develop monitoring solutions, and support data-driven decision making. I am passionate about optimizing systems, improving efficiency, and creating sustainable operational value through analytical thinking and continuous improvement.

In addition to my technical expertise, I have developed leadership, communication, and mentoring skills as a Laboratory Assistant and SNBT Tutor. I aspire to contribute as a Supply Chain and Operations Professional by delivering innovative solutions that drive organizational performance and operational excellence.

Professional Journey

Experience

PAKO GROUP
PAKO Group · Automotive Manufacturing · Sukoharjo, Indonesia
PPIC Intern — Inventory Control Division
PT Inkoasku · Design & Manufacturer of Wheel Rim & Automotive Components
Sep 2025 — Jan 2026
Internship · 5 months

Worked within the Production Planning and Inventory Control (PPIC) division of PAKO Group, focusing on inventory control, material flow management, and MRP-driven operational improvement in a high-volume automotive manufacturing environment.

  • Analyzed end-to-end workflow in Inventory Control with emphasis on Material Requirement Planning (MRP) and Delivery Note (DN) reconciliation to ensure accurate material availability
  • Supported daily Inventory Control activities: MRP execution, DN tracking, and real-time material flow monitoring across production lines
  • Identified and documented 3+ supply discrepancies per month, proposing corrective actions that reduced average lead time by 66%
  • Collaborated with cross-functional teams (procurement, warehouse, production) to streamline material replenishment and improve scheduling accuracy
  • Utilized ERP systems to extract, analyze, and report inventory data supporting management decision-making
Inventory ControlMRPERP System Supply Chain OpsProcess ImprovementData Analysis
PT PP
PT PP (Persero) Tbk · State-Owned Construction · Jakarta, Indonesia
Procurement Intern
50,000 DWT Dock Construction Project · Cross-Functional Procurement Team
Feb 2025 — Mar 2025
Internship · 2 months

Contributed to procurement operations in a large-scale 50,000 DWT dock infrastructure project, gaining practical experience in vendor management, contract compliance, and cross-departmental coordination within Indonesia's leading state-owned construction company.

  • Supported end-to-end procurement for a 50,000 DWT dock construction project, collaborating with engineering, logistics, finance, and project management teams
  • Monitored procurement timelines and material delivery status, ensuring alignment with project scheduling milestones
  • Reviewed and verified 15+ vendor contracts and POs, ensuring 100% compliance with scheduling requirements and procurement SOPs
  • Assisted in vendor evaluation and communication, contributing to efficient supplier selection and order processing
  • Prepared procurement progress reports and documentation supporting project management decision-making
